---
title: ""
about:
    template: trestles
image: img/clay_ford_big_head.jpg
comments: false
---

Hi. I'm Clay. I like to write about statistics, especially for people who struggle with statistics.

I work at the [University of Virginia Library StatLab](https://library.virginia.edu/data/statlab) providing free statistics consulting to students, faculty and staff. There's no actual lab, just an office. But it's a nice office with a window and a little conference table. I also write [articles](https://library.virginia.edu/data/tag/clay-ford) for the StatLab.

I made this web site with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/). I host this site with [DreamHost](https://www.dreamhost.com/).

Thanks for visiting!
